title: Six Prime Ministers In 10 Years, 44 Days, One Lettuce: The UK's Queue
summary_full: The UK has seen six prime ministers in ten years - Keir Starmer, the under-fire incumbent, preceeded by Liz Truss, Rishi Sunak, Boris Johnson, Theresa May, and David Cameron.
summary_public: The UK has seen six prime ministers in ten years - Keir Starmer, the under-fire incumbent, preceeded by Liz Truss, Rishi Sunak, Boris Johnson, Theresa May, and David Cameron.
